Jumping Rivers Pre-course material

Advanced R Programming / Building an R Package

R and RStudio

Please make sure you are using the latest version of R (current version is 3.6.1 - the final digit is the minor version number. The essential numbers are the first two. You can check the version of R you are running via

R.version.string

If installing the latest version is an issue, the previous version 3.5.X should be fine.

Please install the latest version of RStudio (https://www.rstudio.com/products/rstudio/download/).

Additional packages

This course uses a few other packages. Run the following lines of code to install them.

install.packages("drat")
drat::addRepo("jr-packages")
install.packages("jrAdvPackage")

The command

library("jrAdvPackage")

should run in the console window with no errors.
